data.content:
This is an NUnit project on VSTest. Use the `--filter` option with the `ClassName` property:

```bash
dotnet test --filter ClassName~ReportExporterTests
```

The `~` operator means "contains", so this matches the fully qualified class name `Contoso.Reports.Tests.ReportExporterTests`. You could also use an exact match:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests."
```
